notes: no tweaks needed. works out of the box.
title: Midnight Club 2

notes:
The game runs really well, and no configuration changes were made.

The issue with attached gamepads spinning through the menu is a bug with the original game - it was designed to work with DirectInput, and not the newer standard of XInput.
There is a patched executable, however you'll need to find the officialmc2 forum or the Discord. I have not tested this patched version.
title: Midnight Club 2
